subject: Escalation: siamese blockers for Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-4801
body: Please note the siamese stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Winston Churchill. Reference initiative INIT-4801. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: handoff, review.
